code:
/*
1. Mathematics and Basic Sciences:
   - Numerical Methods and Computer Programming
   - Mathematics-III
   - Engineering Mechanics
   - Engineering Geology
   - Fluid Mechanics

2. Surveying and Geotechnical Engineering:
   - Surveying-II
   - Surveying-II Lab
   - Surveying-I
   - Surveying-I Lab
   - Geotechnical Engineering
   - Geotechnical Engineering Lab
   - Surveying Camp

3. Structural Engineering:
   - Strength of Materials
   - Design of Structures-I
   - Structural Analysis-I
   - Structural Analysis-II
   - Design of Structures-II
   - Design of Structures-III

4. Transportation Engineering:
   - Transportation Engineering-I
   - Transportation Engineering-I Lab
   - Transportation Engineering-II

5. Environmental Engineering:
   - Environmental Engineering-I
   - Environmental Engineering-I Lab
   - Environmental Engineering-II
   - Environmental Engineering-II Lab

6. Construction Engineering and Management:
   - Construction Engineering and Project Management
   - Industrial Management and Entrepreneurship
   - Estimation & Costing

7. Hydraulic and Water Resources Engineering:
   - Hydraulic Engineering
   - Hydraulic Engineering Lab
   - Fluid Mechanics & Hydraulics Lab
   - Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering

8. Construction Materials and Technology:
   - Concrete Technology
   - Concrete Technology Lab
   - Building Materials & Construction
   - Material Testing Lab

9. Design and Analysis Tools:
   - Computer Aided Design

10. Communication and Professional Skills:
    - Civil Engineering Drawing
    - Language Lab
    - Professional Communication

11. Electives and Specialization:
    - Elective-I
    - Elective-II
    - Elective-III
    - Elective-IV

12. Projects and Practical Training:
    - Major Project-I
    - Major Project-II
    - Industrial Training
*/

const sem1 = ["Programming for Problem Solving", "Digital Electronics & Logic Design", "Data Structures & Algorithms", "Computer Organization & Architecture", "Design & Analysis of Algorithms", "Database Management System", "Computer Networks", "Operating Systems", "Formal Language & Automata Theory", "Compiler Design"];
const sem2 = ["Machine Learning", "Artificial Intelligence", "Speech & Natural language Processing", "Neural Network and Deep Learning", "Pattern Recognition"];
const sem3 = ["Information Theory and Coding", "Computer Graphics", "Advance Computer Architecture", "Embedded System"];
const sem4 = ["Discrete Mathematics", "Elementary Number Theory and Algebra", "Probability Theory and Random Process", "Engineering Economics", "Environmental Sciences", "Industrial Management Entrepreneurship", "Professional Communication"];
const sem5 = ["Web and Internet Technology", "Cryptography and Network Security", "Ad-hoc and Sensor Network", "Blockchain Technology", "Information Retrieval"];
const sem6 = ["Object Oriented Programming using java", "Software Interaction", "Software Component Design"];
const sem7 = ["Digital Image Processing", "Bio-Informatics", "Robotics and Computer Vision"];
const sem8 = ["VLSI System Design", "Human Computer Interaction", "Computer Controlled Systems"];
const elective = ["History of Science and Engineering", "Cyber Laws and Ethics", "Economics Policies in India"];
const project = ["1 Mini Projects", '2 Major Project'];
export const semList4 = ["Mathematics and Basic Sciences", "Surveying and Geotechnical Engineering", "Structural Engineering", "Construction Engineering and Management", "Hydraulic and Water Resources Engineering", "Construction Materials and Technology", "Communication and Professional Skills", "Applied Systems", "Open Electives ", "Projects"];
export const subjects4 = [sem1, sem2, sem3, sem4, sem5, sem6, sem7, sem8, elective, project];

sourcesContent:
/*
1. Mathematics and Basic Sciences:
   - Numerical Methods and Computer Programming
   - Mathematics-III

   - Engineering Geology
   - Fluid Mechanics

2. Surveying and Geotechnical Engineering:
   - Surveying-II
   - Surveying-II Lab
   - Surveying-I
   - Surveying-I Lab
   - Geotechnical Engineering
   - Geotechnical Engineering Lab
   - Surveying Camp

3. Structural Engineering:
   - Strength of Materials
   - Design of Structures-I
   - Structural Analysis-I
   - Structural Analysis-II
   - Design of Structures-II
   - Design of Structures-III

4. Transportation Engineering:
   - Transportation Engineering-I
   - Transportation Engineering-I Lab
   - Transportation Engineering-II

5. Environmental Engineering:
   - Environmental Engineering-I
   - Environmental Engineering-I Lab
   - Environmental Engineering-II
   - Environmental Engineering-II Lab

6. Construction Engineering and Management:
   - Construction Engineering and Project Management
   - Industrial Management and Entrepreneurship
   - Estimation & Costing

7. Hydraulic and Water Resources Engineering:
   - Hydraulic Engineering
   - Hydraulic Engineering Lab
   - Fluid Mechanics & Hydraulics Lab
   - Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering

8. Construction Materials and Technology:
   - Concrete Technology
   - Concrete Technology Lab
   - Building Materials & Construction
   - Material Testing Lab

9. Design and Analysis Tools:
   - Computer Aided Design

10. Communication and Professional Skills:
    - Civil Engineering Drawing
    - Language Lab
    - Professional Communication

11. Electives and Specialization:
    - Elective-I
    - Elective-II
    - Elective-III
    - Elective-IV

12. Projects and Practical Training:
    - Major Project-I
    - Major Project-II
    - Industrial Training
*/

const sem1 = [
  "Programming for Problem Solving",
  "Digital Electronics & Logic Design",
  "Data Structures & Algorithms",
  "Computer Organization & Architecture",
  "Design & Analysis of Algorithms",
  "Database Management System",
  "Computer Networks",
  "Operating Systems",
  "Formal Language & Automata Theory",
  "Compiler Design",
];
const sem2 = [
  "Machine Learning",
  "Artificial Intelligence",
  "Speech & Natural language Processing",
  "Neural Network and Deep Learning",
  "Pattern Recognition",
];
const sem3 = [
  "Information Theory and Coding",
  "Computer Graphics",
  "Advance Computer Architecture",
  "Embedded System"
];
const sem4 = [
  "Discrete Mathematics",
  "Elementary Number Theory and Algebra",
  "Probability Theory and Random Process",
  "Engineering Economics",
  "Environmental Sciences",
  "Industrial Management Entrepreneurship",
  "Professional Communication"
];
const sem5 = [
  "Web and Internet Technology",
  "Cryptography and Network Security",
  "Ad-hoc and Sensor Network",
  "Blockchain Technology",
  "Information Retrieval"
];
const sem6 = [
  "Object Oriented Programming using java",
  "Software Interaction",
  "Software Component Design"
];
const sem7 = [
  "Digital Image Processing",
  "Bio-Informatics",
  "Robotics and Computer Vision"
];
const sem8 = ["VLSI System Design","Human Computer Interaction","Computer Controlled Systems"];
const elective = [
  "History of Science and Engineering",
  "Cyber Laws and Ethics",
  "Economics Policies in India"
];
const project=["1 Mini Projects",'2 Major Project']
export const semList4 = [
  "Mathematics and Basic Sciences",
  "Surveying and Geotechnical Engineering",
  "Structural Engineering",
  "Construction Engineering and Management",
  "Hydraulic and Water Resources Engineering",
  "Construction Materials and Technology",
  "Communication and Professional Skills",
  "Applied Systems",
  "Open Electives ",
  "Projects"
];

export const subjects4 = [
  sem1,
  sem2,
  sem3,
  sem4,
  sem5,
  sem6,
  sem7,
  sem8,
  elective,
  project
];
